title: Fix heart icon dark mode, search input layout, mega menu alignment
description: 1) Heart icon in Support Drupal pill needs dark mode (white/inverted). 2) Search drawer input should have magnifying glass icon inline next to it, not below. 3) Mega menu item alignment needs fixing.

title: Create 5 playground variants with featured/sponsored content components
description: Create 5 HTML playground files based on index.html, each adding 1-2 new components for featured/sponsored content (e.g. DrupalCon promotion). Variations should explore different design approaches.

title: Integrate partners-2 dark band into main page
description: Copy the Dark Confidence Band partners component from variant-partners-2.html into index.html

title: De-AI the partners variants 1 and 2
description: Apply anti-AI patterns to variant-partners-1 and variant-partners-2. Fix the badge illustration in variant 1.

title: Partners CTA component: 5 design variations
description: Create 5 variants of index.html with a partners/certified agencies CTA component. Content: Looking for the best partners? + description + two CTA buttons.

title: Fix search drawer opened state to match drupal.org
description: Screenshot both our search drawer and drupal.org's when search is clicked. Compare and fix every difference.

title: Featured event component: 5 design variations on actual landing page
description: Add a featured event row component (like DrupalCon promo) to the actual landing page. Research designs from laravel.com and similar. Create 5 HTML copies of index.html each with a different design approach. Must use our branding.

title: React in Drupal: show real canvas screenshot with React code
description: Replace current placeholder with an actual screenshot showing React code in Drupal's Experience Builder canvas. Find a real screenshot from the internet.

title: Header dark/light mode toggle
description: Create two header variations: dark mode (white text on transparent/dark bg for overlay on dark hero) and light mode (dark text on white bg). Make easily togglable. Default to dark mode for this landing page.

title: Canvas thumbnails: click to maximize/zoom
description: The visual page builder section thumbnails should be clickable to open a larger view so users can zoom and see detail.

title: Dark mode for header dropdowns
description: Nav submenus, Support Drupal dropdown, Get Started dropdown, user menu dropdown, and search drawer all need dark mode styling.

title: Get Started button link + working search form
description: 1) Get Started button needs a real link. 2) Search form should submit to drupal.org's search.
